---
name: "\U0001F41E Bug Report"
about: "Thank you for helping improve Late-Meet \U0001F680 Please fill out the sections
  below with as much detail as possible to help us reproduce and fix the issue efficiently."
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug, gssoc
assignees: ''

---

📌 Bug Description

Provide a clear and concise description of the bug.

Example:

What went wrong?
What feature is affected?
When does the issue occur?
🔄 Steps to Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

Go to ...
Click on ...
Join/start a Google Meet session
Perform ...
Observe the issue/error
✅ Expected Behavior

Describe what you expected to happen.

Example:

The transcript should appear correctly
The dashboard should update in real time
Audio capture should initialize successfully
❌ Actual Behavior

Describe what actually happened instead.

Example:

Extension crashes
No transcript appears
Audio capture fails
Dashboard remains blank
📸 Screenshots / Recordings

If applicable, add:

screenshots,
GIFs,
screen recordings,
or logs

to help explain the problem.

💻 Environment

Please complete the following information:

Chrome Version:
Example: 125.0.6422.76
Operating System:
Example: Windows 11, macOS 14.5, Ubuntu 24.04
Extension Version:
Example: 1.0.0
Transcription Provider:
ElevenLabs
OpenAI Whisper
Both
🧾 Console Errors

If applicable:

Open Chrome DevTools (F12)
Navigate to the Console tab
Paste relevant error logs below
Paste console errors here
📝 Additional Context

Add any additional context, observations, or notes about the issue here.

Examples:

Does it happen consistently?
Does refreshing fix it?
Is it specific to certain meetings or browsers?
Any temporary workaround discovered?
🏷️ Metadata
Default Issue Title: [BUG]
Recommended Labels: bug
Assignees: Maintainers will assign contributors after review.

Thank you for contributing to Late-Meet 💙
